name: io.github.neowalter/neoxlink
title: NEOXLINK MCP
description: UNSPSC Standardization & B2B MCP: parse NL to taxonomy, confirm, resolve; optional local match.

environmentVariables.name: NEOXLINK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the NeoXlink API (required for remote parse/confirm).

environmentVariables.name: NEOXLINK_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL; default is production if unset.

environmentVariables.name: NEOXLINK_ENABLE_MATCH
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to register local neoxlink.match_intent.
